lines.text: (reading) [deliberate] Couch built in, and a rack for the cans. Four spares to the unit.
This lime here soaks up what you breathe back out. [pause] Fella asleep don't burn much, so one can runs him most of a day.
(then) You swap it every fifteen hours or so and keep a stack of 'em ready.
The oxygen we already buy by the bottle. It's on the invoices with the welding.
[warmly] There. That'll hold a fella all right.
